title: One Block Hardcore
description: A hardcore One Block modpack is a challenging survival experience where players start on a single block that regenerates endlessly. With permadeath enabled, every mistake matters as you progress through phases, unlock new resources, and face increasingly.
body: A hardcore One Block modpack is a challenging survival experience where players start on a single block that regenerates endlessly. With permadeath enabled, every mistake matters as you progress through phases, unlock new resources, and face increasingly dangerous mobs and bosses. Skill, strategy, and patience are essential to survive and thrive.
